2605.14816.title: Conversion of Lexicon-Grammar tables to LMF. Application to French
2605.14816.paper_summary: We describe the first experiment of conversion of Lexicon-Grammar tables for French verbs into the Lexical Markup Framework (LMF) format. The Lexicon-Grammar of the French language is currently one of the major sources of lexical and syntactic information for French. Its conversion into an interoperable representation format according to the LMF standard makes it usable in different contexts, thus contributing to the standardization and interoperability of natural language processing dictionaries. We briefly introduce the Lexicon-Grammar and the derived dictionaries; we analyse the main difficulties faced during the conversion; and we describe the resulting resource.
2605.14816.paper_summary_zh: 我們描述了將法語動詞的詞彙-語法表轉換為詞彙標記框架（LMF）格式的首次實驗。法語的詞彙-語法目前是法語詞彙和句法信息的主要來源之一。根據LMF標準將其轉換為可互操作的表示格式，使其可以在不同的上下文中使用，從而有助於自然語言處理詞典的標準化和互操作性。我們簡要介紹了詞彙-語法及其衍生詞典；我們分析了轉換過程中面臨的主要困難；並描述了所產生的資源。
2605.14816.author: Eric Laporte et.al.
2605.14816.authors: Eric Laporte, Elsa Tolone, Mathieu Constant
